name: Budget Pacing
description: Track actual ad spend against the configured budget, with end-of-period projections and pacing health indicators. Replaces the spreadsheet pacing math every Friday afternoon.
alsoSurfaces: Are we on pace to hit budget this period?
Which channels are accelerating or decelerating relative to plan?
What's the projected end-of-period overspend or underspend?
Which pacing alerts are critical vs. just worth watching?
beforeWeRun: Budget period: current calendar month, fiscal month, or quarter?
Per-channel breakdown: yes (require channel-level budgets) or blended only?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline pacing
whatYoullGet.desc: Spend-to-date / budget, pacing health indicator, EOP projection, projected variance.

whatYoullGet.name: Spend curve
whatYoullGet.desc: Cumulative daily spend with ideal pacing line and projection band overlay.

whatYoullGet.name: Per-channel pacing
whatYoullGet.desc: Bar chart with pacing percentage per channel, health-band colored.

whatYoullGet.name: Pacing alerts
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of critical / warning / watch alerts with magnitudes.

whatYoullGet.name: Channel detail table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable: budget, spend, pacing, projection, health per channel.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your pacing dashboard in ~8 min.
